title: Senior Software Engineer - BankBazaar - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - BankBazaar - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Join the BankBazaar family as a Senior Software Engineer in Patna. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About BankBazaar:
BankBazaar is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BankBazaar!
